headline: Agoda Localization And AI Uptake Shape Booking Holdings Growth Narrative
summary: Agoda, part of Booking Holdings, reports that nearly all hotels in India using its localization tools are seeing revenue gains. The Agoda 2026 Travel Outlook Report finds Vietnamese travelers show strong trust in AI and a high willingness to use AI tools for upcoming trips. These trends highlight Booking Holdings' focus on localization and artificial intelligence across key Asian markets. For investors tracking Booking Holdings, ticker NasdaqGS:BKNG, this update provides more detail on how...

headline: Agoda Reports Holi Travel Trends in India, with Jaipur and Udaipur Posting Strong Interest
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda analysed accommodation search data for domestic travel for the recent Holi week, revealing a rise in travel interest compared to last year in destinations such as Jaipur, Udaipur and Vrindavan, where traditions, rituals and community celebrations shape the experience. Alongside temple towns and heritage cities, travellers showed interest in destinations that allow them to participate in vibrant festivities and shared cultural moments.
